---
title: "scDiffCom Preprocessing Checks (H&N)"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
---

QC notebook for preprocess outputs: Seurat composition, integration, split-category distributions, dispersion, and profile PCA.

See [README.md](README.md) for section map and partial-run notes.

```{r setup-preprocessing-checks, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  message = TRUE,
  warning = TRUE,
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 7
)

PREPROCESS_CHECKS_DIR <- normalizePath(".", winslash = "/")
PREPROCESS_DIR <- normalizePath(file.path(PREPROCESS_CHECKS_DIR, ".."), winslash = "/")
PROJECT_SCRIPTS <- normalizePath(file.path(PREPROCESS_CHECKS_DIR, "..", "..", ".."), winslash = "/")

source(file.path(PREPROCESS_CHECKS_DIR, "R/00_setup.R"))
source(file.path(PREPROCESS_CHECKS_DIR, "config/hnsc_preprocess_checks.R"))
source(file.path(PREPROCESS_CHECKS_DIR, "R/01_seurat_loaders.R"))
source(file.path(PREPROCESS_CHECKS_DIR, "R/02_integration_helpers.R"))
source(file.path(PREPROCESS_CHECKS_DIR, "R/03_split_qc_helpers.R"))
source(file.path(PREPROCESS_CHECKS_DIR, "R/04_category_distribution.R"))

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(Seurat)

if (!requireNamespace("patchwork", quietly = TRUE)) {
  message("patchwork not installed — profile PCA section may fail.")
} else {
  library(patchwork)
}
```

```{r child = "sections/01_load_axl_cohorts.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/02_celltype_distribution.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/03_merge_combat_umap.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/04_split_category_distribution.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/05_ctla4_atlas_sanity.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/06_gene_dispersion.Rmd"}
```

```{r child = "sections/07_gene_profile_pca.Rmd"}
```
